SEARCH
Package org.praxisplatform.uischema.domain

Record Class DomainCatalogResponse

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
org.praxisplatform.uischema.domain.DomainCatalogResponse
public record DomainCatalogResponse(String schemaVersion, DomainCatalogResponse.DomainServiceInfo service, DomainCatalogResponse.DomainReleaseInfo release, List<DomainCatalogResponse.DomainContextItem> contexts, List<DomainCatalogResponse.DomainNodeItem> nodes, List<DomainCatalogResponse.DomainEdgeItem> edges, List<DomainCatalogResponse.DomainBindingItem> bindings, List<DomainCatalogResponse.DomainAliasItem> aliases, List<DomainCatalogResponse.DomainEvidenceItem> evidence, List<DomainCatalogResponse.DomainGovernanceItem> governance) extends Record
Contrato v0.1 do catalogo semantico publicado por /schemas/domain.

O contrato descreve vocabulario de dominio extraido de metadados ja conhecidos pelo runtime, mantendo ligacoes para APIs, schemas, actions e surfaces existentes.

  • Constructor Details

    • DomainCatalogResponse

      public DomainCatalogResponse(String schemaVersion, DomainCatalogResponse.DomainServiceInfo service, DomainCatalogResponse.DomainReleaseInfo release, List<DomainCatalogResponse.DomainContextItem> contexts, List<DomainCatalogResponse.DomainNodeItem> nodes, List<DomainCatalogResponse.DomainEdgeItem> edges, List<DomainCatalogResponse.DomainBindingItem> bindings, List<DomainCatalogResponse.DomainAliasItem> aliases, List<DomainCatalogResponse.DomainEvidenceItem> evidence, List<DomainCatalogResponse.DomainGovernanceItem> governance)
      Creates an instance of a DomainCatalogResponse record class.
      Parameters:
      schemaVersion - the value for the schemaVersion record component
      service - the value for the service record component
      release - the value for the release record component
      contexts - the value for the contexts record component
      nodes - the value for the nodes record component
      edges - the value for the edges record component
      bindings - the value for the bindings record component
      aliases - the value for the aliases record component
      evidence - the value for the evidence record component
      governance - the value for the governance record component

  • Method Details

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. All components in this record class are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object).
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
